2026-04-23T12:02:09.3493567Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T12:02:09.3494133Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T12:02:09.3494824Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T12:02:09.3495218Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T12:02:09.3495532Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T12:02:09.3495775Z [36;1m[0m

If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. If provided with repo, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Search query using GitHub issues search syntax","type":"string"},"repo":{"description":"Optional repository name. If provided with owner, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort field by number of matches of categories, defaults to best match","enum":["comments","reactions","reactions-+1","reactions--1","reactions-smile","reactions-thinking_face","reactions-heart","reactions-tada","interactions","created","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_issues"}]}}}

2026-04-23T12:06:53.1813116Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T12:03:01.507948168Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58597,\"title\":\"[ContainerInstance] Docs: Add examples for ContainerGroupProfile, ContainerGroupProfileRevision, and NGroup resource types\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #57490) by `@ArcturusZhang`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57490 added the initial `1.0.0-beta.1` release of the `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance` library. It includes four generated provisioning resource types:\\n- `ContainerGroup` — basic container group (has an example in README)\\n- `ContainerGroupProfile` — reusable container group profile\\n- `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — versioned revision of a container group profile\\n- `NGroup` — N-Group resource for confidential/scale container scenarios\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- No README example for `ContainerGroupProfile` — this resource type enables reusable container templates and is a first-class provisioning resource with no documentation\\n- No README example for `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — revision management of container group profiles is undocumented\\n- No README example for `NGroup` — an entirely new resource concept (\\u0026#34;N-Group\\u0026#34;) with no explanation or sample usage; the name alone offers no guidance to users\\n- Only one test snippet exists (`Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic`) covering just `ContainerGroup`; no test-backed samples are provided for the three remaining resource types\\n- The \\u0026#34;Authenticate the Client\\u0026#34; section in README is empty (a heading with no content)\\n- The \\u0026#34;Next steps\\u0026#34; section in README is empty\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Understand the existing structure\\n\\nThe test backing the current snippet is at:\\n`sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/tests/BasicContainerInstanceTests.cs`\\n\\nIt uses the `Trycep` provisioning test helper with `#region Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic` / `#endregion` to supply the snippet shown in the README. Follow the same pattern for the new snippets.\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n#### 2a. Add a `ContainerGroupProfile` + `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` example\\n\\nAdd a new test method to `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/tests/BasicContainerInstanceTests.cs` (or a new `BasicContainerInstanceProfileTests.cs` in the same folder):\\n\\n```csharp\\ninternal static Trycep CreateContainerGroupProfileTest()\\n{\\n    return new Trycep().Define(\\n        ctx =\\u0026gt;\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ContainerInstanceProfile\\n            Infrastructure infra = new();\\n\\n            ContainerGroupProfile profile =\\n                new(nameof(profile), ContainerGroupProfile.ResourceVersions.V2025_09_01)\\n                {\\n                    ContainerGroupOSType = ContainerInstanceOperatingSystemType.Linux,\\n                    RestartPolicy = ContainerGroupRestartPolicy.Always,\\n                    Containers =\\n                    {\\n                        new ContainerInstanceContainer\\n                        {\\n                            Name = \\u0026#34;hello\\u0026#34;,\\n                            Image = \\u0026#34;mcr.microsoft.com/azuredocs/aci-helloworld\\u0026#34;,\\n                            Resources = new ContainerResourceRequirements\\n                            {\\n                                Requests = new ContainerResourceRequestsContent { Cpu = 1, MemoryInGB = 1.5 }\\n                            }\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                };\\n            infra.Add(profile);\\n            #endregion\\n\\n            return infra;\\n        });\\n}\\n\\n[Test]\\npublic async Task CreateContainerGroupProfile()\\n{\\n    await using Trycep test = CreateContainerGroupProfileTest();\\n    // add expected bicep comparison string here after verifying output\\n    test.Compare(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;...\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n\\u0026gt; **Note:** Inspect the generated `ContainerGroupProfile.cs` and `ContainerGroupProfileRevision.cs` under `src/Generated/` to determine the correct properties and `ResourceVersions` constants to use, and fill in the expected Bicep output in `test.Compare(...)`.\\n\\n#### 2b. Add an `NGroup` example\\n\\nAdd a method showing how to create an `NGroup` resource. Inspect `src/Generated/NGroup.cs` for required properties. Wrap the infrastructure-definition code with:\\n\\n```\\n#region Snippet:ContainerInstanceNGroup\\n...\\n#endregion\\n```\\n\\n#### 2c. Add snippet placeholders in the README\\n\\nIn `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/README.md`, under the `## Examples` section, add two new subsections **after** the existing \\u0026#34;Create a Linux Container Group with a Public IP\\u0026#34; subsection:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Create a Container Group Profile\\n\\nTODO: brief description\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create an NGroup\\n\\nTODO: brief description\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n#### 2d. Fill the empty \\u0026#34;Authenticate the Client\\u0026#34; section\\n\\nFor provisioning libraries, authentication is handled by `azd` at deploy time, not by the library at runtime. Add the following content under the `### Authenticate the Client` heading:\\n\\n```markdown\\nThis library generates Bicep infrastructure definitions and does not connect to Azure at authoring time. Authentication is handled by the [Azure Developer CLI (`azd`)]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) when you run `azd up` or `azd provision` to deploy the generated infrastructure to Azure.\\n```\\n\\n#### 2e. Fill the \\u0026#34;Next steps\\u0026#34; section\\n\\n```markdown\\n- Explore the [Azure Container Instances documentation]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted)\\n- Learn about [Azure Developer CLI (`azd`)]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) for deploying provisioning infrastructure\\n- Browse the [Azure.Provisioning](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/provisioning/Azure.Provisioning) core library for shared infrastructure primitives\\n```\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/README.md` currently contains all required sections, but the following are empty or incomplete:\\n\\n| Section | Status | Action |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| Getting started \\u0026gt; Install the package | ✅ | None |\\n| Getting started \\u0026gt; Prerequisites | ✅ | None |\\n| Getting started \\u0026gt; Authenticate the Client | ❌ Empty | Add content per Step 2d |\\n| Key concepts | ✅ Minimal (consistent with other provisioning libs) | None |\\n| Examples | ⚠️ Only ContainerGroup | Add snippets per Step 2a–2c |\\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ | None |\\n| Next steps | ❌ Empty | Add content per Step 2e |\\n| Contributing | ✅ | None |\\n\\nUse `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` as the canonical reference for section formatting.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next.\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 containerinstance` — injects `#region Snippet:` code into README placeholder blocks; verify the README diff looks correct\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 containerinstance` — no public API changes expected, but run to confirm\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\u0026gt; Generated by [Update Docs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24833660014/agentic_workflow) · ● 747K · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAzure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net+is%3Aissue+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+Azure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net%2Fupdate-samples-and-docs%22\\u0026amp;type=issues)\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58597\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"github-actions[bot]\",\"id\":41898282,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/apps/github-actions\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/15368?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-23T12:00:27Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-23T12:00:27Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-23T12:06:53.1908185Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T12:03:30.810744042Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"total_count\":1,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4315751195,\"number\":58597,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"[ContainerInstance] Docs: Add examples for ContainerGroupProfile, ContainerGroupProfileRevision, and NGroup resource types\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #57490) by `@ArcturusZhang`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57490 added the initial `1.0.0-beta.1` release of the `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance` library. It includes four generated provisioning resource types:\\n- `ContainerGroup` — basic container group (has an example in README)\\n- `ContainerGroupProfile` — reusable container group profile\\n- `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — versioned revision of a container group profile\\n- `NGroup` — N-Group resource for confidential/scale container scenarios\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- No README example for `ContainerGroupProfile` — this resource type enables reusable container templates and is a first-class provisioning resource with no documentation\\n- No README example for `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — revision management of container group profiles is undocumented\\n- No README example for `NGroup` — an entirely new resource concept (\\\"N-Group\\\") with no explanation or sample usage; the name alone offers no guidance to users\\n- Only one test snippet exists (`Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic`) covering just `ContainerGroup`; no test-backed samples are provided for the three remaining resource types\\n- The \\\"Authenticate the Client\\\" section in README is empty (a heading with no content)\\n- The \\\"Next steps\\\" section in README is empty\\n\\n\\u003cdetails\\u003e\\n\\u003csummary\\u003e\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\u003c/summary\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Understand the existing structure\\n\\nThe test backing the current snippet is at:\\n`sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/tests/BasicContainerInstanceTests.cs`\\n\\nIt uses the `Trycep` provisioning test helper with `#region Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic` / `#endregion` to supply the snippet shown in the README. Follow the same pattern for the new snippets.\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n#### 2a. ContainerResourceRequirements\\n                            {\\n                                Requests = new ContainerResourceRequestsContent { Cpu = 1, MemoryInGB = 1.5 }\\n
